title: connected board
excerpt:
There is no dialog box when you click “x” button on connected board, saying that "are you sure you want to remove connected board? 
Just one accidental click is enough to destroy connection

posts.author: dkolotauri1 (Dimitri)
posts.cookedHtml:
There is no dialog box when you click “x” button on connected board, saying that "are you sure you want to remove connected board?

Just one accidental click is enough to destroy connection
